nasb.text: But the men reached out their hands and brought Lot into the house with them, and shut the door.

esv.text: But the men reached out their hands and brought Lot into the house with them and shut the door.

cnv.text: 那兩個人卻伸出手來，把羅得拉進屋裡去，並把門關上。

ccb.text: 那两位天使伸手把罗得拉进屋里，关上了门，

csbs.text: 那两个人就伸出手，把罗得拉进屋内他们那里，并把门关上。
